name: Signatur Fastigheter AB (publ)
summary: Signatur Fastigheter AB (publ) manufactures and sells flame retardant products in Europe. It offers Apyrum flame retardants for industrial and service companies for use in natural and synthetic fibers, PVC, and cellulose-based materials; Apyrum Powder, a fine powder that is added to polymeric materials suspensions where water is not desired; and Apyrum Liquids, a water-based flame retardant that is used for impregnation of natural and mixed fibers and materials. The company was formerly known as Deflamo AB (publ) and changed its name to Signatur Fastigheter AB (publ) in December 2019. Signatur Fastigheter AB (publ) was founded in 2004 and is based in Karlshamn, Sweden.
